2 weeks, the patient has been moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite – being so fidgety or restless that they have been moving around a lot more than usual. 0. Never or 1 day 
1. 2-6 days (several days) 
2. 7-11 days (half or more of the days) 
3. 12-14 days (nearly every day) CHAR 1 x
D0150I1_THGHT_BTR_DD_CD Mood: Thoughts of better off dead: Pres Indicates whether, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has had thoughts that they would be better off
